email.description: Email address used for authentication and notifications. Trimmed and lowercased on submit.

password.description: Password (8-128 chars). Must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number, and one special character (@$!%*?&).

description: Sign-up payload. LGPD requires explicit `acceptedTosVersion` / `acceptedPrivacyVersion` matching the current published versions.
